task_updates.executor_notes: Expanded `createEntityStore` coverage to verify bootstrap precedence, lazy once-per-entity load, optimistic debounced persistence, deferred text-field flush, revert, reset-to-clean baseline semantics including explicit reset payloads, save-error retention/clear, safe external sync refusal while dirty or pending, and selector isolation between entity subscribers. Verified with the full module run: `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/shared/state/createEntityStore.test.ts`.

Ported `useJoinClipsSettings` onto a module-scoped entity store while keeping `useToolSettings` as the sole authoritative merged-read/readiness source, using a disabled sentinel only for hook ordering, preserving `initializeFrom` as a no-op, leaving automatic text-field deferral unset, syncing direct saves into the React Query cache plus invalidation, and restoring best-effort flush on project change, unmount, and `beforeunload` for real entity IDs only. Verified with `npx tsc --noEmit`.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. The full store test module now exercises bootstrap precedence, one-time lazy load, debounced save timing, deferred text edits plus explicit flush, revert, reset-clean behavior, retained save errors, external sync refusal while dirty or pending, and cross-entity selector isolation.

Yes. The Join Clips adapter now reconciles authoritative `useToolSettings` data into the entity store, keeps nullish IDs behind an inert sentinel, preserves the existing public hook surface including no-op `initializeFrom`, updates the project settings query cache on direct saves before invalidation, and flushes pending real-entity edits on entity change, unmount, and `beforeunload`.
